description: Calibration log for the thread-selection judgement behind the forum-outreach Fermi model, using the real ZEIT-online forum reaction measures. For each building-block post (anchored by its forum URL as a ref of type general) a forecast of each reaction count is recorded BEFORE posting (assumed value, committed in its own git commit so the timestamp proves it predates the result), and the observed counts are recorded AFTER (measured value). The measures are the five ZEIT reaction icons (star = positive/agreeing, smile = friendly/amused, astonished = surprised, frown = rejecting/displeased, eyebrow = skeptical) plus the count of substantive text replies. The calibration error (forecast minus observed) is calc-validated per measure per post, so over time the graph shows whether the pre-post thread-fit judgement is well calibrated or systematically too optimistic. Replace the example post with real ones; add the measured values and their calc-validation in a later commit once each thread's reaction has settled.

words.name: post
words.description: a single message submitted to an online forum or comment thread.

words.name: Die Zeit
words.description: Die Zeit is a German national weekly newspaper published in Hamburg in Germany.[3][4] The newspaper is generally considered to be among the German newspapers of record and is known for its long and extensive articles.

words.name: zukunftcom
words.description: A sample online account name.

words.name: thread
words.description: a series of forum messages on one topic, shown as a connected sequence.

words.name: reply
words.description: a message written in answer to an earlier message.

words.name: substantive
words.description: engaging with the content of an argument rather than with its tone or the person.

words.name: reaction
words.description: a reader response to a post, on ZEIT online registered by clicking one of the reaction icons.

words.name: icon
words.description: a small pictogram a reader clicks to react to a post.

words.name: star
words.description: the ZEIT online star reaction icon, expressing a positive, agreeing response.

words.name: smile
words.description: the ZEIT online smile reaction icon, expressing a friendly or amused response.

words.name: astonished
words.description: the ZEIT online astonished reaction icon, expressing surprise.

words.name: frown
words.description: the ZEIT online frown reaction icon, expressing a rejecting or displeased response.

words.name: eyebrow
words.description: the ZEIT online raised-eyebrow reaction icon, expressing skepticism.

words.name: fit
words.description: how well a thing matches a purpose or context.

words.name: forecast
words.description: an estimate of a future value made before it is observed.

words.name: calibration
words.description: the degree to which forecast quantities match observed outcomes.

words.name: error
words.description: the difference between an estimated value and its observed value.

words.name: count
words.description: the number of items in a set.

words.name: measured value
words.description: a value taken from an observation or a cited source.

words.name: assumed value
words.description: a value set by reasoned assumption before observation, not measured.
the date 20 June 2026.

triples.name: substantive reply
triples.description: a reply that engages with the content of the building-block argument.

triples.name: star reaction
triples.description: a reader reaction registered with the ZEIT star icon (positive/agreeing).

triples.name: smile reaction
triples.description: a reader reaction registered with the ZEIT smile icon (friendly/amused).

triples.name: astonished reaction
triples.description: a reader reaction registered with the ZEIT astonished icon (surprised).

triples.name: frown reaction
triples.description: a reader reaction registered with the ZEIT frown icon (rejecting/displeased).

triples.name: eyebrow reaction
triples.description: a reader reaction registered with the ZEIT raised-eyebrow icon (skeptical).

triples.name: star reaction count
triples.description: the number of star reactions a post draws.

triples.name: smile reaction count
triples.description: the number of smile reactions a post draws.

triples.name: astonished reaction count
triples.description: the number of astonished reactions a post draws.

triples.name: frown reaction count
triples.description: the number of frown reactions a post draws.

triples.name: eyebrow reaction count
triples.description: the number of eyebrow reactions a post draws.

triples.name: substantive reply count
triples.description: the number of substantive text replies a post draws.

triples.name: thread fit
triples.description: how well a thread matches the goal of reaching a qualified reader; the pre-post forecast of the reaction counts is its operational form.

triples.description: forecast minus observed smile reaction count for one post.

triples.description: forecast minus observed astonished reaction count for one post.

triples.description: forecast minus observed frown reaction count for one post.

formulas.name: star reaction calibration error (formula)
formulas.expression: "star reaction calibration error" = "star reaction count forecast" - "star reaction count"

formulas.name: smile reaction calibration error (formula)
formulas.expression: "smile reaction calibration error" = "smile reaction count forecast" - "smile reaction count"

formulas.name: astonished reaction calibration error (formula)
formulas.expression: "astonished reaction calibration error" = "astonished reaction count forecast" - "astonished reaction count"

formulas.name: frown reaction calibration error (formula)
formulas.expression: "frown reaction calibration error" = "frown reaction count forecast" - "frown reaction count"

formulas.name: eyebrow reaction calibration error (formula)
formulas.expression: "eyebrow reaction calibration error" = "eyebrow reaction count forecast" - "eyebrow reaction count"

formulas.name: substantive reply calibration error (formula)
formulas.expression: "substantive reply calibration error" = "substantive reply count forecast" - "substantive reply count"

calc-validation.note: forecast 8 star - observed 5 = 3 (too optimistic on agreement).
forecast 3 frown - observed 6 = -3 (more rejection than expected; the negative sign flags an under-forecast).
